TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Lyung Penux ga te mspat kininryuyux nya mki Taywang. sesyaw na Lyung Penux ga mpuw payat alang ku ki mbku kya. aring te wawi ga wiwan pu'ing na rgyax Papak Wa_a. te utux ga S'uraw, Maylubung, Maytayax, Mbwanan, Maypuwan, Nuhuw, Lipa, Suruw, payat alang hani ga tinlangan na Bare. hugan nya lga Tgbin, L'olu, Kagaw,Kling, M'ihu ru S'yux, mt'yu alang hani ga cinlangan na Thetun. Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' 大安溪水系Lyung Penux hiya ga niya balay gska sku sobih ss'ka na Taywang. pu'ing uwang nya ga minhbku sku rgyax na Papak Wa'a. hminas sku sesyaw nya ga, niya mbku kya ku gong Mtara, Mrayan, Zipaw, Tmaku, Bling, Tawn muwah msu'un sku Lyung Penux.
S.PHON: ljuŋ penux ɣa te ms~ɕpat kininrjujux nja mki tajwaŋ. s~ɕes~ɕjaw na ljuŋ penux ɣa mpuw pajat alaŋ ku ki mβku kja. ariŋ te wawi ɣa wiwan puʔiŋ na rɣjax papak waəa. te utux ɣa s~ɕʔuraw, majluβuŋ, majtajax, mβwanan, majpuwan, nuħuw, lipa, s~ɕuruw, pajat alaŋ ħani ɣa tinlaŋan na βare. ħuɣan nja lɣa tɣβin, lʔolu, kaɣaw,kliŋ, mʔiħu ru s~ɕʔjux, mtʔju alaŋ ħani ɣa ʦ~ʨinlaŋan na tħetun. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ *****ljuŋ penux ħija ɣa nija βalaj ɣs~ɕka s~ɕku s~ɕoβiħ s~ɕs~ɕʔka na tajwaŋ. puʔiŋ uwaŋ nja ɣa minħβku s~ɕku rɣjax na papak waʔa. ħminas~ɕ s~ɕku s~ɕes~ɕjaw nja ɣa, nija mβku kja ku ɣoŋ mtara, mrajan, zipaw, tmaku, βliŋ, tawn muwaħ ms~ɕuʔun s~ɕku ljuŋ penux.
S.FORM: Lyung Penux ga te mspat kininryuyux nya mki Taywang. sesyaw na Lyung Penux ga mpuw payat alang ku ki mbku kya. aring te wawi ga wiwan pu'ing na rgyax Papak Wa_a. te utux ga S'uraw, Maylubung, Maytayax, Mbwanan, Maypuwan, Nuhuw, Lipa, Suruw, payat alang hani ga tinlangan na Bare. hugan nya lga Tgbin, L'olu, Kagaw,Kling, M'ihu ru S'yux, mt'yu alang hani ga cinlangan na Thetun. Cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' 大安溪水系Lyung Penux hiya ga niya balay gska sku sobih ss'ka na Taywang. pu'ing uwang nya ga minhbku sku rgyax na Papak Wa'a. hminas sku sesyaw nya ga, niya mbku kya ku gong Mtara, Mrayan, Zipaw, Tmaku, Bling, Tawn muwah msu'un sku Lyung Penux.
S.PHON: ljuŋ penux ɣa te ms~ɕpat kininrjujux nja mki tajwaŋ. s~ɕes~ɕjaw na ljuŋ penux ɣa mpuw pajat alaŋ ku ki mβku kja. ariŋ te wawi ɣa wiwan puʔiŋ na rɣjax papak waəa. te utux ɣa s~ɕʔuraw, majluβuŋ, majtajax, mβwanan, majpuwan, nuħuw, lipa, s~ɕuruw, pajat alaŋ ħani ɣa tinlaŋan na βare. ħuɣan nja lɣa tɣβin, lʔolu, kaɣaw,kliŋ, mʔiħu ru s~ɕʔjux, mtʔju alaŋ ħani ɣa ʦ~ʨinlaŋan na tħetun. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ *****ljuŋ penux ħija ɣa nija βalaj ɣs~ɕka s~ɕku s~ɕoβiħ s~ɕs~ɕʔka na tajwaŋ. puʔiŋ uwaŋ nja ɣa minħβku s~ɕku rɣjax na papak waʔa. ħminas~ɕ s~ɕku s~ɕes~ɕjaw nja ɣa, nija mβku kja ku ɣoŋ mtara, mrajan, zipaw, tmaku, βliŋ, tawn muwaħ ms~ɕuʔun s~ɕku ljuŋ penux.
